basics.name: Aman Agarwal
basics.title: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable web applications and AI-powered systems. Passionate about leveraging LLMs and RAG architectures to create intelligent user experiences. Experienced in TypeScript, Python, and cloud-native development.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Leading the development of AI-powered search and retrieval systems. Designed and implemented a RAG pipeline that serves 500k+ queries daily with sub-200ms P95 latency. Built a citation grounding system that reduced hallucination rates by 60%. Architected a multi-tenant vector store using Pinecone with namespace isolation. Mentoring a team of 4 engineers on LLM integration best practices.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Built the core product frontend using Next.js and React, serving 50k daily active users. Designed RESTful APIs with Node.js and PostgreSQL handling 2M requests/day. Implemented real-time collaboration features using WebSockets. Led migration from JavaScript to TypeScript across the entire codebase (200k+ lines). Introduced CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions reducing deployment time by 80%.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Developed real-time fraud detection microservices processing 10M+ transactions daily using Kafka and Python. Built internal dashboards with React that reduced fraud investigation time by 45%. Implemented event-driven architecture patterns for transaction monitoring. Collaborated with data science team to deploy ML models into production serving infrastructure.

experience.title: Junior Developer
experience.description: Built responsive websites and web applications for 30+ clients using React and WordPress. Introduced automated testing practices that caught 40% more bugs before deployment. Set up CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins that cut deployment time by 70%. Developed custom WordPress plugins and themes for enterprise clients.

education.description: Focus on distributed systems and machine learning. Senior thesis on 'Efficient Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search in High-Dimensional Spaces' — directly relevant to modern vector databases. Dean's List 2015-2017.

certifications.name: Deeplearning.AI — LangChain for LLM Application Development
